data.title: Add condensed ## AI Blindspot Annotations (all four checks) to reviewer-delta-standard.md
data.description: Insert ## AI Blindspot Annotations section before ## Overlay Classification in reviewer-delta-standard.md. Content: condensed ALL FOUR checks: domain mismatch, UI artifacts, spaghetti patching, asymmetric change (SC1(d) requires all four). All in summary ONLY. Commit message must note: SC1(d) requires all four condensed checks - human reviewer must confirm all four present. Run build-review-agents.sh. Commit delta + all 10 agents. Depends on T4. testing_mode: UPDATE.
